name: TRUSTCO BANK CORP N Y
summary: PART I General TrustCo Bank Corp NY ( TrustCo or the Company ) is a savings and loan holding company having its principal place of business at 5 Sarnowski Drive, Glenville, New York 12302. TrustCo was incorporated under the laws of New York in 1981 to be the parent holding company of The Schenectady Trust Company, which subsequently was renamed Trustco Bank New York and, later, Trustco Bank, National Association.
